name: gripper_assisted_drop_v5
description: Manual-manipulation approach: grasp the new ball from a spawn point and lower it gently.
source_code:
async def gripper_assisted_drop_v5():
    await set_gripper(True)
    await move_to('spawn_point', 0, 0, 0.5)
    await set_gripper(False)
    await place_at(0.2, 0.2, 0.1)
    return {'success': True}
